title: Surgeon Vacancy at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
